name: 13.4oz 4pk Plastic Wine Glasses - Room Essentials™: Stemless, Outdoor, Dishwasher-Safe, Clear Drinkware
description: Pour your guests their favorite drink in the 4-Pack Plastic Wine Glasses from Room Essentials™. Featuring a clear design and a classic round silhouette, these stemless wine glasses look stunning filled with delicious merlots or zinfandels, and they bring contemporary flair to your barware collection. Crafted from BPA-free plastic for raising a toast on various occasions, you can simply toss them in the dishwasher for easy cleanup.
